english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response: First, you must take the big thing that you do not know and break it into many small things. This is good because a big thing can be too much for your head to hold all at once. Second, you should look at the first small thing and ask what you already know to be true. Third, you should look for the things you do not know about that small thing and write them down. The thing after the third, you should try to find a way to find the truth about those things you do not know by looking at what is around them. The thing after the thing after the third, once you know the truth about the first small thing, you can move to the next small thing. The thing after the thing after the thing after the third, you should keep doing this until you have put all the small pieces together. The thing after the thing after the thing after the thing after the third, you should look at the whole thing again to see if it makes sense and if the pieces fit well. If something does not feel right, you must go back to the part where you felt the thing was not right and try again. This way of working helps you not to get lost in the big thing.

english_query: how some ideas stop you from thinking further
ugf_response:
Sometimes, the way you think about a thing can stop you from seeing more about that thing. This happens when you have a set way of looking at the world. You build a house of thoughts in your mind. Each thought sits on top of the one before it. This house looks strong and good to you. You feel that you know the truth. But because you are inside this house, you can only see what the windows allow you to see. You do not see the trees outside or the sky above. You only see the walls you made.

First, you start with a thought that you believe is true. This thought is like a ground for all your other thoughts. You use this ground to build more thoughts. Each new thought must fit with the first one. If a new thought does not fit, you throw it away. You tell yourself that the new thought is wrong. You do not stop to think that your first thought might be wrong. You only look for things that make your house feel safe.

Second, this way of thinking makes you stop looking for new ways to see. When you think you already know the way, your mind stops working hard. It is like a man who thinks he knows the way home, so he stops looking at the signs on the road. He walks in the wrong way because he does not want to change his mind. His own thought tells him he is right, so he stops asking if he is right.

Third, this can lead to a bad place. If your first thought was not the whole truth, then every thought you build on top of it will also be not the whole truth. You are building a very tall thing on a ground that is not flat. The thing might look good for a while, but it is not real. You think you are learning more, but you are only learning more about the things you got wrong. You are not seeing the world as it is. You are only seeing the world as your first thought says it must be. To stop this, you must be willing to break your house and start again on new ground.

english_query: why everyone doing what is best for them can make things worse for all
ugf_response:
Person one: I do not get it. If every person does what is good for them, why would things go bad for everyone?

Person two: It is a hard thing to see. Think about a group of people who all want more money. Each person tries to get as much as they can for themselves.

Person one: But if they all have more money, does that not make the whole group better?

Person two: Not always. If everyone tries to take more than their share, the things they want might run out. Or, they might do things that hurt others just to get ahead. When everyone thinks only of their own good, they stop thinking about the good of the whole group.

Person one: So, if I only care about me, I might do something that hurts you, and then you do something to hurt me back?

Person two: Yes. That is what happens. If everyone acts only for themselves, the things that keep us all safe and happy can break. The things that help us all stay together fall into pieces because no one is looking after them. Everyone is too busy looking after only their own small part.

english_query: how taking care of others is a kind of work that matters
ugf_response:
The first idea is that looking after other people is a kind of work. The person says that when you give your time and your care to help someone else, you are doing a job. The second idea is that this kind of work is important and has much good in it. The person thinks that because this work helps people live better or stay alive, it is something that should be seen as being as good as any other job.

The thing that follows from these two ideas is that we should act toward people who do this work in the same way we act toward people who do other jobs. If we say this work is important, then we must make sure the people doing it are able to live well themselves.

When we look at how the person thinks, we see it is a good way of thinking. It takes something that people often do for free or for very little, and it shows why it is a real job. It is a good way to look at the world because it shows that helping people is not just a nice thing to do, but it is a thing that keeps our world going. However, to make this idea work, one must be very careful to say what kind of work it is and how we should pay for it so that it stays good for everyone.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response:
The first idea is that a person sometimes thinks there are only two ways for something to be. They think it is either this way or that way, and nothing else can happen. This is a way of thinking that can be wrong because many times there are many more ways for things to go.

The second idea is what comes from this way of thinking. If a person believes there are only two ways, they will make a choice between those two ways. Because they do not see the other ways that could work, they might pick a way that is not good. They might pick a way that makes things worse when a better way was there all along.

The third idea is whether this way of thinking is good or bad. This way of thinking is bad. It is not a good way to use your mind. When you only see two ways, you are not seeing the whole truth. You are missing the other ways that are real. To think well, you must look for all the ways things could be, not just the two ways you see right now. If you do not do this, your choices will not be good.

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response:
Imagine you are walking down a long road. You have a bag of money to buy things. You decide to buy a small thing. Now you have less money. Then you see a bigger thing. You think to yourself, I have already spent a lot of money on this trip, so I might as well buy this big thing too. This is a way of thinking that can hurt you.

Let us look at how this works step by step. First, you spend some money on a thing. This money is gone. You cannot get it back. It does not matter if you buy one thing or ten things, that money is now gone. Second, you look at how much you have already spent. You feel that because you have already spent a lot, the money you spent before is not important anymore. You think the money you spent before and the money you are about to spend are joined together.

But this is not true. The money you spent before is gone. It is in the past. When you decide whether to buy something new, you should only think about the money you have right now and whether the new thing is good for you. You should not think about the money you already let go of. If you buy the new thing only because you already spent money, you are making a choice that is not right. You are letting the past make a bad choice for your future. You are acting as if the money you spent before can change how you think about the money you have now. This is a way of thinking that is not right. To make a good choice, you must look at the money you have in your hand and nothing else.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
When you look at the world, you do not see everything at once. Instead, you see the world through a way of thinking that you already have inside your head. This way of thinking is made of all the things you think are true. These things you think are true act like a set of eyes that you cannot take off.

Think about it this way. Imagine you are wearing glasses that are a deep red color. When you look at a white wall, you will see a red wall. You do not think the wall is red, but your eyes tell you it is. Your glasses change what you see before the information even gets to your brain. Your old thoughts are like those glasses. They change how you see new things before you even have a chance to think about them.

First, your brain wants to save time and the power it needs to work. It is hard to look at every new thing as if it were completely new. It would take too much work. So, your brain looks at a new thing and asks, does this fit with what I already know? If the new thing fits well with your old thoughts, your brain says, yes, this is right, and you let it in easily. If the new thing does not fit, your brain feels a kind of trouble. It might even try to make the new thing look wrong so that your old thoughts stay the same.

Second, you only notice things that are the same as your old thoughts. If you think that all dogs are mean, and you see a new dog, your brain will look for ways that the dog is mean. You might see a dog moving its back part from side to side, but your brain will say, no, it is just doing that to make you think something that is not true. You will look for the bite or the loud sound a dog makes when it is mad because that is what you expect to see. You do not look for the good way a dog acts because your old thoughts told you it was not there.

Third, this makes it hard to learn things that go against what you believe. When you see something that shows your old thought is wrong, it feels bad. It feels like the world is not what you thought it was. To stop this bad feeling, many people will just say the new thing is not true. They will find a way to make the new thing fit into their old way of thinking, even if they have to bend it to make it work.

So, what you think now is the way you see what comes next. Your old thoughts act like a map. If your map says there is a river in a certain place, you will look for a river there. If you do not see one, you might think your eyes are bad, rather than thinking your map is wrong. To see the world as it really is, you must remember that you are wearing those colored glasses, and you must try to take them off.

english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response:
To understand what makes a person feel good in a way that stays for a long time, we must first look at how two kinds of good feelings are not the same. The first kind is a feeling that comes and goes very fast. This happens when you eat something that has a good way of being in your mouth, or when you get a new thing that you want. This feeling is like a bright light that goes on for a moment and then goes away. It does not stay in your heart or change who you are.

The second kind of feeling is much deeper. It is not a flash of light, but more like a heat that does not change from a fire that keeps you warm all through the night. This kind of feeling comes from how you live your life and how you act toward the world.

First, this deep feeling comes from doing things that are hard but good. When you work to learn something new or when you try to do something that is not easy, you feel a sense of being whole. This is not about the feeling of winning, but about the feeling that you are growing. When you see yourself become better at something because you worked for it, that feeling stays with you. It builds a strong house inside your mind that does not fall down when things go wrong.

Second, this deep feeling comes from how you are with other people. This is not just about having people to talk to or having people who give you things. It is about being known by others and knowing them too. It is about being able to give of yourself to help someone else. When you care for another person and they care for you, it creates a thing that ties you together that makes your life feel like it has a reason to be. This reason is a very strong part of being happy.

Third, this deep feeling comes from living in a way that is the same as what you believe is right. If you believe that being kind is good, but you act in a way that is mean, you will feel a break inside yourself. This break makes it hard to feel good in a real way. But when the things you do and the things you think are the same, you feel a sense of quiet rest. This quiet rest is what we mean when we talk about being happy in the deepest way. It is the feeling that you are a whole person, doing what you should do, in a world where you belong.

english_query: why different situations need different kinds of good character
ugf_response:
The person is saying three things. The first idea is that what is good to do can change when the world around you changes. They say that being a good person is not about doing the same thing every time. Instead, they say that being good means doing the right thing for the very one moment you are in. The second idea is what they think comes from this. They think that because the world is always changing, a good person must have many different ways of acting. One way of acting might be good when things are calm, but that same way might be bad when things are hard or make you feel fear. The third idea is whether their thinking is good.

To see if their thinking is good, we must look at how they build their case. The first part of their thinking is strong because it is true that the world changes. We know that being kind to a child is not the same as being kind to a person who wants to hurt you. The second part of their thinking is also strong. It makes sense that a person needs many different ways of being good to meet the many ways the world changes. However, we must be careful. If we say that what is good changes too much, we might lose the things that are always good. If there are no things that stay the same, then we might not know how to be a good person at all. We must find a way to have things that stay the same while also being able to change when the moment needs it.

english_query: how to build fair rules if you did not know your place in the world
ugf_response:
The first idea that the case says is true is that a human can never be sure where they belong in the big picture of life. It says that you may not know if you are rich or poor, not strong or strong, high or low, or what group you will end up in. Because of that, the case says we have no clear picture of our own spot when we try to think about what is good for everyone.

From that, the second idea that the case says should follow is that the thing we tell all people to do must not need to know any spot of a human. The case says that the best way to keep things good for all is to build a system that acts the same toward each human, no matter what they might be. It says we should try to set up a plan that gives each human the same chance to be helped or to be asked to follow an order, and that the plan should not give extra help to some just because we think they are in a certain place. In short, the case says that if we do not know the spot of each human, the only safe way is to use an order that does not look at that spot at all.

The third idea looks at whether this way of thinking is good. One good part is that it tries to stop the hurt that can happen when an order is made for a group that the maker does not belong to. By not looking at spot, the order cannot easily pick one group over another, which can keep many humans from feeling left out. Another good part is that it can be simple to follow, because everyone can see the same order and know that it does not change for different humans.

But there are also things that make this thinking hard to use well. First, an order that does not look at spot may miss the fact that some humans really do need more help because they start from a lower place. If the order acts the same toward everyone, it can end up keeping the space between humans who have a lot and those who have very little, because those who already have a lot get the same help as those who have very little. Second, we may not be able to know if an order is really good for all unless we can see how it works for each kind of human. Without that look, we might think an order is good while it actually hurts some groups. Finally, the case does not say how to take care of the fact that we can sometimes learn a little about the spot of a human, even if we never know it all the way. Ignoring all that information may throw away a thing we use that could make the order better for those who need it most.

All in all, the case gives a clear picture of a true fact – we do not know our the very same spot – and it draws a clear line from that fact to a plan for making an order that does not use that not known. The thinking is strong in its want to stop hurt that comes from guessing about other humans’ places, but it may be too simple when it comes to actually helping a world where humans start from many different places. A better way might be to use an order that mostly does not look at spot, but that also has a small part that can give extra help when we see that someone is clearly starting from a lower place. This would keep the good part of the idea while fixing the part that can leave some humans behind.

english_query: how to think about what is fair when people start in different places
ugf_response: First, we look at how people start their lives. Some people start with much more than others. They might have more money, or more help from their families, or better schools. This means the place where they begin is not the same for everyone. Second, we must ask what it means to be right and good in how we act with people. Some might say being right means everyone gets the same number of things at the start. But if some people start with nothing and others start with much, giving them the same number of things does not make things even. Third, we can look at it another way. We can say being right is about making sure everyone has the same chance to reach a thing they want. If one person has a hard path and another has an easy path, they do not have the same chance. This means we might need to give more help to the person with the hard path. This help can make the paths look more like each other. The step after the third step is to think about the end. We might ask if it is right that some people end up with much more than others because they started with more. To make this right, we might say that we should change the way things work so that the starting place does not decide everything. Finally, we see that being right is not just about what people have, but about how much help they need to have a real chance to do well.

english_query: why the way a question is asked can change the answer you give
ugf_response: First, we see that the words we use when we ask can make the person think in some way. Then we see that the mind of the person who hears the words looks at them and tries to put together them with what they know. This means that if we ask in a kind or hard way the mind may pick a different idea to talk about. Also if we ask with a yes or no way the answer will be short while if we ask with a why way the answer will try to give a reason. Also the person may feel a push if the ask sounds like a hard push so they may give an answer they think is wanted. So the way the ask is made can change the answer because the mind puts together the ask with different ideas, feelings and ways to act.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response:
When you want to know the whole truth about what happened to a person, you must look for things that are not seen at first. Most people only tell you what they want you to know. They might hide things because they are afraid or because they want to look good. To find the things they hide, you must act like a person who looks for small marks on the ground to see where an animal went.

First, you must listen to what the person says and then look for what they do not say. If a person tells a story about a bad thing that happened, look for the parts that do not fit together. If the story changes every time they tell it, there is a hidden part. You should ask them to tell the story again but change the order of the things that happened. If they cannot do this without doing things that are not right, they might be hiding something.

Second, you must look at the things around them. If a person says they were in one place, but the things they have with them show they were in a different place, you have found a hidden part. You must look at the things that people leave behind. These things do not lie like people do.

Third, you must look at how the person feels when you ask certain things. If you ask a question and the person becomes very angry or very quiet, that is a sign. The part of the story that makes them feel this way is the part that is probably what they are trying to keep hidden. You must go slowly and be very kind. If you are too hard, they will close their hearts and you will find nothing.

Finally, you must put all these small pieces together. You take the things they said, the things they did, and the things they felt. When you put them all together, the shape of the truth will start to show itself. The truth is often like a picture that is covered by a piece of soft thing used to hide things. You cannot see it all at once, but by pulling that thing away bit by bit, you will see what was there all along.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response:
When you want to know the whole story about what a person did or what happened to them, you must look for the things they do not say. Most people only tell the parts of the story that make them look good or the parts that are easy to say. To find the parts that are not seen, you must work in steps.

First, you must look at what the person tells you. Write down every word they say. Then, look for the places where the story stops. A place where the story stops too soon or does not make sense is where a piece of the story is missing. If a person tells you they went to a place, but they do not say how they got there or who they saw, that is a missing piece. These missing pieces are where the hidden things live.

Second, you must look at what the person does. People often say one thing but do another. If a person says they are happy but their face looks sad or their hands shake, the shaking hands tell a different story. You must watch their body and what they do to see if those things are the same as their words. If they are not the same, the truth is probably in the part that is not the same.

Third, you must look for other things that show what happened. This could be papers, or things they own, or what other people say. If two people tell you two different stories about the same thing, you must look for a third way to know what is true. You might look at a paper that shows a time or a place. This paper does not have feelings and it does not try to look good, so it can tell you the truth that the person is hiding.

The step after the third step is to ask questions that do not let the person give a short answer. Do not ask questions that can be answered with yes or no. Instead, ask them to tell you the whole story of a moment. If you ask them to tell you about a time, they will have to speak more. When they speak more, they might say something that they did not mean to say, or they might say something that does not fit with the rest of their story.

Finally, you must put all these pieces together. You take the words, the things they do, the other things you found, and the new things they said when you asked more questions. You look at them all at once. When you see where they all meet, you will see the shape of the hidden story. The hidden story is the part that fills the missing pieces and makes all the pieces fit together.

english_query: the question of whether animals feeling pain matters as much as people
ugf_response:
Person 1: Do animals feel hurt like we do?  
Person 2: Yes, many animals show signs that they feel hurt when they get hurt.  

Person 1: If they feel hurt, should we think about them the same as we think about people?  
Person 2: Some people say we should try to keep them safe the same way we try to keep people safe, because the feeling is real.  

Person 1: But why would it be the same? Aren’t people different?  
Person 2: The feeling of hurt is a feeling inside a body. It does not matter if the body has two legs or four legs, the feeling still works.  

Person 1: Does that mean we must act toward them the same in all ways?  
Person 2: It means we should try not to cause hurt to them unless we have a very good reason, and we should try to help them when they are hurt, just like we do for people.  

Person 1: What about when we need to use animals for food or work? How does that work?  
Person 2: That is a hard part. Some say we can use them if we try to make the hurt as small as we can and only if we need them for something we can not do without.  

Person 1: So the most important thought is to think about their hurt as real and try to keep it small?  
Person 2: Yes, that is the most important thought.

english_query: why people sometimes pick the worse thing even when they know better
ugf_response:
Sometimes a person knows that one path will lead to a good life and another path will lead to a bad life. They can see the bad path coming from far away. They know it will bring them pain or make them lose what they love. Yet, they walk toward the bad path anyway. They choose the thing that will hurt them. This is a strange thing that happens to many people.

The big question is why this happens. If we know what is good and what is bad, why do we not always choose the good? Why does the mind lead the body to do things that we know are not good for us?

Some people say this happens because our feelings are stronger than our thoughts. A person might feel a strong want right now. This want is like a fire that burns very hot. The thought that the fire will burn them later is like a small, cold wind. The hot want wins. The person wants the way something feels in their mouth or the fast fun now, even if they know it will make them feel bad when the sun goes down.

Other people say this happens because our brains are not made for the world we live in now. Long ago, humans had to find food and stay safe from big animals. In those times, taking what was in front of them was good. Now, we have many things that look good but are not good for us. Our brains still work in the old way. We see something that looks good for a moment and we take it before we can think about the long time ahead.

Some people also say that we do not know the person we are as well as we think. We think we are the ones who have all the power over our own minds. But there are parts of our mind that work without us knowing. These parts can push us toward a bad choice without us feeling it happen. We might think we are making a choice, but we are really just following a path that was already set by things we do not see.

english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response:
Person 1: What makes a person feel good in a strong long way, not just for a short time?  

Person 2: It is when a person has good friends, a place they can call home, and work or play that they can see as real and true for them.  

Person 1: How do friends help make that long feeling of good?  

Person 2: Friends give love, help when we are sad, share laughs, and make us feel we are not alone. That feeling stays and can grow.  

Person 1: What about work or play? How do those add to a long good feeling?  

Person 2: Work or play that we can see as something we can do well gives us a sense that we can add to something. When we see a thing that comes after we do something, we feel a strong inside feeling and safe.  

Person 1: Is there a reason why feeling safe matters for this long good feeling?  

Person 2: When we feel safe we can think about other things, not just worry about something that can hurt. That lets us look at life and see more good.  

Person 1: Can a person feel this long good feeling if they do not have all those things at once?  

Person 2: Yes, a person can start with one small piece of work, like a friend or a small piece of work, and let that grow. Over time more parts can join and make the whole feel good for a long time.  

Person 1: So the main thing is to have many small parts that fit together and grow?  

Person 2: Yes, that is the idea. Small good parts can add up, and the more they fit, the more the feeling stays and gets stronger.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
Person 1: I ask why what I already think changes how I see new things.  

Person 2: When you think something, that thought stays in your head. It works like a way you look at all new things. It can make you see them in a way that go with the thought.  

Person 1: Can you give a simple show of that?  

Person 2: Imagine you put a dark cover over what you look at. The cover blocks some of the light, so everything looks a bit dark. Your thought works like that cover.  

Person 1: Does that mean I can change the way I see by changing my thoughts?  

Person 2: Yes. If you try to think new ways, the old thought will be less big. Then the new things will look more easy.  

Person 1: How can I make my old thought less big?  

Person 2: You can ask yourself if the old thought go with the new thing. You can look for other thoughts that also go with it. You can try looking at the new thing without the old thought first.

english_query: when it is good enough to pick something that works instead of the best thing
ugf_response:
First idea says that when you have a thing that works well enough you can pick that thing even if it is not the very best thing. It tells us that a working thing can be enough for the need we have, and that we do not have to keep looking for the top thing if the one we have already does the job.

Second idea says that from the first idea we can think that we do not need to keep looking for a better thing. It makes us feel that once we have a thing that works we can stop looking and just use that thing. It also leads us to think that we can save time and effort by staying with the thing that works, even when a better thing might be out there somewhere else.

Third idea looks at whether that way of thinking is right. It points out that sometimes it is good to use a thing that works because we may not have time or the things we have to find the top thing. It also shows that the thinking can be not right when the thing that works is only a little bit good and a much better thing could give us far more being not hurt, being well, or a good end. In those cases the thinking may make us miss out on a chance to get a much better end. So the thinking can be good in some situations and not good in others, and we should ask we if the thing we have is enough for what we need or if looking for a better thing would give us a big get more. The best way is to check how important the need is, how much time we have, and how much better the other thing could be, and then decide if a working thing is enough or if we should keep looking for the top thing.

english_query: how a person can change who they are by changing what they do
ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person thinks about who they are. Most people believe that their heart and their mind make them who they are, and that what they do is just a way to show that. They think that if they are a kind person, they will do kind things. Then, we must look at the other way of thinking. This way says that what a person does is what makes them who they are. If a person does kind things every day, they will start to see themselves as a kind person. We can see this by looking at how our bodies and minds work. When we do something many times, it becomes easy and we do it without thinking. This makes the thing we do part of us. We can also see that when we change our ways of acting, our thoughts begin to change to be the same as our new ways. To show this, if a person who thinks they do not want to work starts to work hard every day, their mind will slowly change to say they are a hard worker. This happens because the mind wants what we do and what we think to be the same. Finally, we see that by choosing new things to do, a person can build a new way of being. By changing the small things they do, they change the big thing that is their life.
